_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemical analysis of a human tissue microarray demonstrated increased cytoplasmic FOXR2 expression in MPNSTs compared to neurofibromas
details: Immunohistochemical analysis demonstrated increased cytoplasmic FOXR2 expression in MPNSTs compared to neurofibromas
